playbook.intent: MVP is live but stuck under ~$1K MRR.
playbook.scope: MVP is live but stuck under ~$1K MRR. Run a structured discovery+positioning+experiment loop until either a fit signal is reached (retention curve flattens, NPS-style pull, organic referrals) or a documented pivot is triggered.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Diagnose stuck signal
stage.intent: Confirm we are truly stuck and identify the leak.

tasks.task: Pull cohort retention, activation, and growth curves
Compare current data to PMF rubric thresholds
Identify the single biggest leak (acquisition / activation / retention / revenue)

stage.decision-gate: Advance with a named leak. If retention flat AND no leak found, sunset path opens.

stage.name: Power interviews
stage.intent: Asymmetric churn + power-user interviews to find the missing job.

tasks.task: Interview 5 power users who love the product
Interview 5 churned/lapsed users on why they left
Surface the dominant job-to-be-done vs the imagined one

stage.decision-gate: Advance if a clear job we are actually hired for emerges, else recruit another 5.

stage.name: Positioning sharpen
stage.intent: Re-write positioning around the real job, not the imagined one.

tasks.task: Update the one-liner, headline, and category claim
Map differentiators against top-3 competitors
Re-shoot landing page above the fold

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 outsiders can repeat the positioning back unprompted.

stage.name: Experiment design
stage.intent: Pick 1-3 focused experiments per fortnight, not 10.

tasks.task: List candidate experiments tied to the named leak
Score by RICE, pick top 1-3
Pre-register hypothesis + success metric for each

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a north-star metric movement target per experiment.

stage.name: Run + measure
stage.intent: Ship experiments and let them cook for one full cohort.

tasks.task: Implement experiment behind a flag
Hold for at least one cohort cycle
Read results against pre-registered metric

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each experiment has a clear keep/kill/iterate call.

stage.name: Re-score against PMF rubric
stage.intent: Honest re-check against the PMF rubric for solos.

tasks.task: Re-run the PMF rubric scoring
Compare to baseline at start of hunt
Decide if the curve flattened, lifted, or stayed flat

stage.decision-gate: Advance if score moved up >=1 band. If flat for 2 consecutive cycles, escalate to pivot.

stage.name: Decide: continue / pivot / sunset
stage.intent: Written commitment based on the rubric trend.

tasks.task: Write the decision with evidence trail
If continue, commit to the next 90-day milestone
If pivot, hand off to the v1-to-v2 playbook
If sunset, plan a clean shutdown

outputs.output: 90-day commitment OR pivot brief OR sunset plan

stage.decision-gate: No maybe allowed. Document must name a single path forward.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content productmarket-fit-hunt-post-mvp-pre-traction --format md, agent: faion get-content productmarket-fit-hunt-post-mvp-pre-traction --format context, json: faion get-content productmarket-fit-hunt-post-mvp-pre-traction --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
